pathAssistantSteps.info:
Refining the Deal:

  • Adjust if Needed: If the customer requests changes, update the synced Quote to keep Opportunity totals accurate. If the new Quote requires approval, it will be automatically submitted upon saving the Quote Line Items.


Preparing for Shipment:

  • Shipment2 Prep: Verify the shipping address is correct for the upcoming Shipment2 record creation.
  • Create Shipment2 Action: If everything has been finalized, Create the Shipment2 record by clicking the 'Create Shipment2' Action Button at the top right of this page. This will automatically send an email the Primary Contact and to the Logistics Team

Welcome to the New stage! Let's get this deal moving:

  • Update Description: Briefly explain the scope of this new opportunity in the Description field.
  • Choose Pricebook: Set the Pricebook according to the Business Type.
  • Create Initial Quote: Draft the initial estimate for the customer by clicking on New Quote on the Quote related list on the right.

Goal: Finalize the quote and deliver it to the customer.

Moving from Draft to Delivery:

  • Final Review of Quote: Ensure the Quote contains all necessary line items and correct quantities.
  • Sync Data: Link your Quote to this Opportunity to automate revenue tracking by going into the Quote record and clicking the Start Sync action.
  • Complete the Presented Stage in the Synced Quote: Once the Quote is approved (if needed), You must send the Quote to the customer after which you may update the Quote status to Presented.

Next Step: Once the customer acknowledges the quote or provides feedback, advance to Negotiation.
